name: Mycotopia Therapies Inc.
summary: Mycotopia Therapies Inc. provides psychedelic therapies through technology-focused, data-driven, and medical-based solutions for people dealing with anxiety, depression, bipolar disorders, PTSD, ADHD, autism, and addictions. The company was incorporated in 2019 and is based in Aventura, Florida. The company operates as a subsidiary of EHAVE, Inc.
